name: Motor Start/Stop
desc: Basic motor start-stop with interlock, feedback, and fault detection
logic: IF stop_pb.value OR NOT interlock THEN motor.cmd.stop:=TRUE
IF start_pb.value AND interlock AND NOT motor.sts.faulted THEN motor.cmd.start:=TRUE
IF motor.sts.running AND NOT motor.io.run_fbk AFTER motor.cfg.start_delay THEN motor.fault.active:=TRUE
